---
title: "Teleost richness and relative abundance at a reef and a sandy site in Plettenberg Bay -- deployment-level analysis"
author: "Mario Morales"
date: "2026-06-24"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, results = "asis")
```

<!--
=================================================================================
morales_teleost6.Rmd -- deployment-level analysis of the 2024 Plettenberg Bay BRUV survey.

WHY THIS VERSION EXISTS
The raw file (fishdata.xlsx) has 98 rows, but these are GoPro video CHAPTERS, not
independent deployments. Hanna's deployment log and chapter crosswalk confirm 18 usable
deployments (14 Jacob's Reef, 4 Meidebank). The correct observational unit is the
DEPLOYMENT. Species MaxN for a deployment is the MAXIMUM across that deployment's chapters,
never the sum. Two deployments are valid biological zeros (no fish): 0071 and 0085.

DESIGN CONSTRAINT
One fixed reef site and one fixed sandy site: site, habitat, depth and MPA status are
confounded and habitat is NOT replicated. Analyses are therefore DESCRIPTIVE and
site-specific. No general habitat / MPA / seasonal inference is made.

MODULARITY
read_fishdata() -> build_crosswalk() -> aggregate_maxn() -> build_matrix() are written as
reusable functions so Keyleigh's 2025 data (replicated rocky/sandy locations) can be ingested
later with the same pipeline (see Keyleigh2025_Integration_Handoff.md).

OUTPUTS: data/processed/*_v6.csv ; output/v6_* ; figures/v6_* ; output/v6_VERIFICATION_LOG.txt
=================================================================================
-->

# 0. Setup, configuration, and modular functions

```{r config}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse); library(readxl); library(vegan)
  library(here); library(officer); library(flextable)
})
set.seed(42)
dir.create(here("output"), showWarnings = FALSE); dir.create(here("figures"), showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(here("data","processed"), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
verif <- character(0); add_check <- function(msg, ok) { verif[[length(verif)+1]] <<- sprintf("[%s] %s", ifelse(ok,"PASS","FAIL"), msg); stopifnot(ok) }

# ---- The 25 valid teleost species (explicit whitelist) + verified metadata -----
lookup <- tribble(
  ~species,                        ~common,             ~family,            ~status,
  "Sarpa salpa",                   "Strepie",           "Sparidae",         "LC",
  "Diplodus capensis",             "Blacktail",         "Sparidae",         "LC",
  "Spondyliosoma emarginatum",     "Steentjie",         "Sparidae",         "LC",
  "Chrysoblephus laticeps",        "Roman",             "Sparidae",         "LC",
  "Boopsoidea inornata",           "Fransmadam",        "Sparidae",         "LC",
  "Lithognathus mormyrus",         "Sand steenbras",    "Sparidae",         "LC",
  "Pomadasys olivaceum",           "Pinky",             "Haemulidae",       "LC",
  "Rhabdosargus globiceps",        "White stumpnose",   "Sparidae",         "VU",
  "Rhabdosargus sarba",            "Natal stumpnose",   "Sparidae",         "LC",
  "Rhabdosargus holubi",           "Cape stumpnose",    "Sparidae",         "LC",
  "Lithognathus lithognathus",     "White steenbras",   "Sparidae",         "EN",
  "Liza dumerili",                 "Southern mullet",   "Mugilidae",        "LC",
  "Clinus superciliosus",          "Super klipfish",    "Clinidae",         "LC",
  "Cheilodactylus fasciatus",      "Redfingers",        "Cheilodactylidae", "LC",
  "Cheimerius nufar",              "Santer",            "Sparidae",         "DD",
  "Galeichthys feliceps",          "White sea catfish", "Ariidae",          "LC",
  "Mugil cephalus",                "Flathead mullet",   "Mugilidae",        "LC",
  "Chirodactylus brachydactylus",  "Twotone fingerfin", "Chirodactylidae",  "LC",
  "Pachymetopon aeneum",           "Blue hottentot",    "Sparidae",         "LC",
  "Argyrozona argyrozona",         "Carpenter",         "Sparidae",         "LC",
  "Amblyrhynchotes honckenii",     "Evileye blaasop",   "Tetraodontidae",   "LC",
  "Dichistius multifasciatus",     "Banded galjoen",    "Dichistiidae",     "LC",
  "Gymnocrotaphus curvidens",      "Janbruin",          "Sparidae",         "LC",
  "Diplodus hottentotus",          "Zebra",             "Sparidae",         "LC",
  "Caffrogobius nudiceps",         "Barehead goby",     "Gobiidae",         "LC")
species_whitelist <- lookup$species

# ---- Authoritative deployment roster (Hanna's Q&A Table 1): expected verification --
# date | site(raw) | recording suffix | n chapters | note
expected_dep <- tribble(
  ~dep, ~date,         ~site_raw,    ~suffix, ~n_chapters, ~note,
  1,   "2024-02-14", "Meidebank",  "0078", 2,  "",
  2,   "2024-02-23", "Jacobs",     "0084", 7,  "",
  3,   "2024-03-01", "Jacobs",     "0088", 6,  "",
  4,   "2024-03-06", "Jacobs",     "0090", 6,  "",
  5,   "2024-03-06", "Meidebank",  "0105", 1,  "GX camera; separate from Dep 12",
  6,   "2024-03-15", "Jacobs",     "0095", 5,  "lat 32->34 corrected",
  7,   "2024-03-26", "Jacobs",     "0098", 7,  "lat 32->34 corrected",
  8,   "2024-04-04", "Meidebank",  "0100", 4,  "",
  9,   "2024-04-04", "Jacobs",     "0101", 1,  "short/incomplete; separate from 0102",
  10,  "2024-04-04", "Jacobs",     "0102", 4,  "",
  11,  "2024-04-18", "Jacobs",     "0104", 7,  "",
  12,  "2024-04-23", "Jacobs",     "0105", 6,  "GH camera; separate from Dep 5",
  13,  "2024-05-01", "Jacobs",     "0107", 7,  "",
  14,  "2024-08-22", "Meidebank",  "0071", 7,  "BIOLOGICAL ZERO",
  15,  "2024-08-27", "Jacobs",     "0072", 10, "",
  16,  "2024-09-02", "Jacobs",     "0073", 8,  "",
  17,  "2024-10-25", "Jacobs",     "0085", 8,  "BIOLOGICAL ZERO",
  18,  "2024-12-02", "Jacobs",     "0093", 2,  "date confirmed from deployment log")
bio_zero_suffix <- c("0071","0085")

# ---- Modular functions ---------------------------------------------------------
# Read the chapter-level fish data and normalise identifiers/metadata.
read_fishdata <- function(path) {
  raw <- readxl::read_excel(path, sheet = "data", .name_repair = "minimal")
  names(raw) <- trimws(names(raw))
  sp <- names(raw)[15:39]
  stopifnot(setequal(sp, species_whitelist))            # exactly the 25 species, no Row-ID/metadata
  tib <- tibble(
    chapter   = trimws(as.character(raw[["Name"]])),
    date_raw  = trimws(as.character(raw[["Date"]])),
    site_raw  = trimws(as.character(raw[["Location"]])),
    temp      = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(raw[["Temp"]])),
    season_raw= trimws(as.character(raw[["Season"]])))
  # corrections (documented): incomplete December date -> 2024-12-02
  tib$date_raw[tib$date_raw == "2024_12"] <- "2024_12_02"
  tib$date  <- as.Date(tib$date_raw, format = "%Y_%m_%d")
  tib$camera<- substr(tib$chapter, 1, 2)                 # GH or GX
  tib$suffix<- sub("^G[HX][0-9]{2}([0-9]{4})$", "\\1", tib$chapter)
  # site -> reader-facing label (local names retained once in the manuscript Methods)
  tib$site  <- dplyr::recode(tib$site_raw, "Jacobs" = "Reef", "Meidebank" = "Sandy")
  spdf <- raw[, sp]                                      # tibble preserves species names (with spaces)
  spdf[] <- lapply(spdf, function(x){ x <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x)); x[is.na(x)] <- 0; x })
  dplyr::bind_cols(tib, spdf)
}

# Build the chapter -> deployment crosswalk. Deployment identity = date + site + suffix
# (this naturally separates the two 0105 deployments by date and site).
build_crosswalk <- function(chapters) {
  cw <- chapters |>
    mutate(deployment_key = paste(format(date, "%Y-%m-%d"), site_raw, suffix, sep = "|")) |>
    group_by(deployment_key) |>
    mutate(deployment_id = cur_group_id()) |> ungroup()
  # order deployment_id by date then site for stable, report-friendly numbering
  ord <- cw |> distinct(deployment_key, date, site_raw) |> arrange(date, site_raw) |>
    mutate(dep = row_number())
  cw |> select(-deployment_id) |> left_join(select(ord, deployment_key, dep), by = "deployment_key")
}

# Aggregate chapters to one row per deployment: species MaxN = MAX across chapters (never sum).
aggregate_maxn <- function(cw) {
  sp <- species_whitelist
  meta <- cw |> group_by(dep) |>
    summarise(date = first(date), site_raw = first(site_raw), site = first(site),
              suffix = first(suffix), camera = first(camera),
              n_chapters = n(), temp = suppressWarnings(max(temp, na.rm = TRUE)),
              .groups = "drop") |>
    mutate(temp = ifelse(is.finite(temp), temp, NA_real_)) |> arrange(dep)
  mat <- cw |> group_by(dep) |> summarise(across(all_of(sp), ~ max(.x, na.rm = TRUE)), .groups = "drop") |> arrange(dep)
  list(meta = meta, mat = mat)
}
```

# 1. Read data, build and VERIFY the deployment crosswalk

```{r crosswalk}
chapters <- read_fishdata(here("data","raw","fishdata_2024_chapters.xlsx"))
add_check(sprintf("Chapter rows read = %d (expected 98)", nrow(chapters)), nrow(chapters) == 98)

cw <- build_crosswalk(chapters)
dep_seen <- cw |> distinct(dep, date, site_raw, suffix) |>
  left_join(cw |> count(dep, name = "n_chapters"), by = "dep") |> arrange(dep)

add_check(sprintf("Deployments after crosswalk = %d (expected 18)", nrow(dep_seen)), nrow(dep_seen) == 18)
site_counts <- dep_seen |> count(site_raw)
add_check("Site split = 14 Jacob's Reef / 4 Meidebank",
          setequal(paste(site_counts$site_raw, site_counts$n), c("Jacobs 14","Meidebank 4")))
add_check("Every chapter maps to exactly one deployment", all(!is.na(cw$dep)) && nrow(cw) == 98)

# Verify the derived crosswalk against Hanna's authoritative Table 1 (date, site, suffix, n chapters)
chk <- dep_seen |> mutate(date = format(date, "%Y-%m-%d")) |>
  select(date, site_raw, suffix, n_chapters) |> arrange(date, site_raw, suffix)
exp <- expected_dep |> select(date, site_raw, suffix, n_chapters) |> arrange(date, site_raw, suffix)
add_check("Derived crosswalk matches Hanna's Table 1 exactly (date/site/suffix/chapter count)",
          isTRUE(all.equal(as.data.frame(chk), as.data.frame(exp))))
add_check("Two distinct 0105 deployments retained (Meidebank GX vs Jacob's GH)",
          sum(dep_seen$suffix == "0105") == 2)
add_check("0101 and 0102 are separate deployments", all(c("0101","0102") %in% dep_seen$suffix))

readr::write_csv(cw |> select(dep, chapter, camera, suffix, date, site_raw, site),
                 here("data","processed","deployment_chapter_crosswalk_v6.csv"))
cat("**Crosswalk built and verified: 98 video chapters -> 18 deployments (14 Reef, 4 Sandy).**\n\n")
print(knitr::kable(dep_seen |> mutate(date = format(date,"%Y-%m-%d")) |>
  transmute(Dep = dep, Date = date, Site = recode(site_raw,"Jacobs"="Reef","Meidebank"="Sandy"),
            Recording = suffix, Chapters = n_chapters)))
```

# 2. Aggregate to deployment level (MaxN = maximum across chapters) and VERIFY

```{r aggregate}
agg <- aggregate_maxn(cw); meta <- agg$meta; mat <- agg$mat
biota <- as.data.frame(mat[, species_whitelist], check.names = FALSE); rownames(biota) <- meta$dep

add_check(sprintf("Deployment-level matrix has 18 rows, 25 species (got %dx%d)", nrow(biota), ncol(biota)),
          nrow(biota) == 18 && ncol(biota) == 25)
add_check("No Row-ID / metadata column in the species matrix", !("Row-ID" %in% names(biota)))

# MaxN rule check: every deployment x species value equals the MAX of its chapter values (never sum)
recompute <- cw |> group_by(dep) |> summarise(across(all_of(species_whitelist), ~ max(.x)), .groups="drop") |> arrange(dep)
add_check("Deployment MaxN == max(chapter MaxN) for all deployment x species (0 discrepancies)",
          isTRUE(all.equal(as.data.frame(recompute[,species_whitelist]), as.data.frame(mat[,species_whitelist]))))
# Worked example from Hanna: Dep 0084 (Reef) White Steenbras = 4 (not 9)
d84 <- which(meta$suffix == "0084")
add_check("Worked example: Dep 0084 White steenbras MaxN = 4 (sum would be 9)",
          biota[d84, "Lithognathus lithognathus"] == 4)
# Biological zeros retained as valid all-zero rows
bz <- which(meta$suffix %in% bio_zero_suffix)
add_check("Biological-zero deployments 0071 and 0085 present and all-zero",
          length(bz) == 2 && all(rowSums(biota[bz, , drop=FALSE]) == 0))

dep_out <- bind_cols(meta, biota)
readr::write_csv(dep_out, here("data","processed","teleost_deployment_level_v6.csv"))
cat("\n**Deployment-level matrix written (18 deployments x 25 species; MaxN = max across chapters).**\n\n")
```

# 3. Descriptive analysis (site-specific; no habitat/MPA/seasonal inference)

```{r analysis}
# Seasons (calendar + temperature framing), for description only
season_of <- function(d){ m <- as.integer(format(d,"%m"))
  dplyr::case_when(m %in% c(12,1,2)~"Summer", m %in% 3:5~"Autumn", m %in% 6:8~"Winter", m %in% 9:11~"Spring") }
meta$season  <- factor(season_of(meta$date), levels=c("Summer","Autumn","Winter","Spring"))
meta$thermal <- factor(ifelse(meta$season %in% c("Summer","Autumn"),"Warm (summer-autumn)","Cool (winter-spring)"))

# Per-deployment richness and Shannon
meta$richness <- specnumber(as.matrix(biota))
meta$shannon  <- diversity(as.matrix(biota), index="shannon", base=exp(1))
n_obs_species <- sum(colSums(biota) > 0); n_families <- lookup |> filter(species %in% names(biota)[colSums(biota)>0]) |> distinct(family) |> nrow()
n_zero_dep    <- sum(rowSums(biota) == 0)

cat(sprintf("**Effort.** %d usable deployments: %d at the Reef and %d at the Sandy site, across %d sampling dates (%s). %d deployments recorded no teleost.\n\n",
  nrow(meta), sum(meta$site=="Reef"), sum(meta$site=="Sandy"), dplyr::n_distinct(meta$date),
  paste0(format(min(meta$date),"%b %Y"),"-",format(max(meta$date),"%b %Y")), n_zero_dep))
cat(sprintf("**Observed assemblage.** %d teleost species from %d families were recorded across the two sites.\n\n", n_obs_species, n_families))

# Richness / Shannon summaries by site (descriptive)
site_summ <- meta |> group_by(Site = site) |>
  summarise(n_deployments = n(),
            richness_median = median(richness), richness_min = min(richness), richness_max = max(richness),
            shannon_median = round(median(shannon),2), .groups="drop")
cat("**Per-deployment richness and Shannon by site (descriptive; all deployments shown in Figure 2).**\n\n")
print(knitr::kable(site_summ))

# Frequency of occurrence (n/N and %) and mean MaxN per site (means include valid zeros)
idxR <- which(meta$site=="Reef"); idxS <- which(meta$site=="Sandy"); nR <- length(idxR); nS <- length(idxS)
spp_tab <- lookup |>
  mutate(freq_Reef  = colSums(biota[idxR, species] > 0), pct_Reef = round(100*freq_Reef/nR),
         maxN_Reef  = round(colMeans(biota[idxR, species]), 2),
         freq_Sandy = colSums(biota[idxS, species] > 0), pct_Sandy = round(100*freq_Sandy/nS),
         maxN_Sandy = round(colMeans(biota[idxS, species]), 2),
         total_MaxN = colSums(biota[, species])) |>
  arrange(desc(total_MaxN))
readr::write_csv(spp_tab, here("output","v6_species_site.csv"))

# Between-the-two-sites difference: DESCRIPTIVE only (Cliff's delta as a descriptive effect size)
cd <- as.data.frame(effectsize::cliffs_delta(richness ~ site, data = meta))
cliff_rich <- as.numeric(cd[[grep("delta|rank_biserial", tolower(names(cd)))[1]]])
cat(sprintf("\n**Between-site difference (descriptive).** Per-deployment richness was higher at the Reef (median %d, range %d-%d, n=%d) than the Sandy site (median %d, range %d-%d, n=%d); Cliff's delta = %.2f. With one fixed site per habitat and only %d sandy deployments, this is reported descriptively and is NOT generalised to a reef-versus-sand habitat effect.\n\n",
  site_summ$richness_median[site_summ$Site=="Reef"], site_summ$richness_min[site_summ$Site=="Reef"], site_summ$richness_max[site_summ$Site=="Reef"], nR,
  site_summ$richness_median[site_summ$Site=="Sandy"], site_summ$richness_min[site_summ$Site=="Sandy"], site_summ$richness_max[site_summ$Site=="Sandy"], nS,
  cliff_rich, nS))

# Species table (Word) -- common, scientific, family, status, occurrence n/N, mean MaxN per site
ft <- spp_tab |> transmute(`Common name`=common, Species=species, Family=family, Status=status,
        `Reef occ. (n/N)`=sprintf("%d/%d", freq_Reef, nR), `Reef MaxN`=maxN_Reef,
        `Sandy occ. (n/N)`=sprintf("%d/%d", freq_Sandy, nS), `Sandy MaxN`=maxN_Sandy) |>
  flextable() |> italic(j="Species") |> bold(part="header") |> fontsize(size=9, part="all") |> theme_booktabs() |> autofit()
read_docx() |>
  body_add_par("Table. Teleost species recorded at the Reef and Sandy sites: family, IUCN Red List conservation status, frequency of occurrence (number of deployments in which the species was recorded out of all usable deployments at that site), and mean deployment-level MaxN (including zero-fish deployments).", style="Normal") |>
  body_add_flextable(ft) |>
  body_add_par("Conservation status follows the IUCN Red List of Threatened Species (www.iucnredlist.org, accessed June 2026): DD Data Deficient, LC Least Concern, VU Vulnerable, EN Endangered. Reef n = 14 deployments; Sandy n = 4.", style="Normal") |>
  print(target = here("output","v6_species_table.docx"))
cat("**Species table written to output/v6_species_table.docx.**\n\n")
print(knitr::kable(head(spp_tab |> select(common, species, family, status, freq_Reef, maxN_Reef, freq_Sandy, maxN_Sandy, total_MaxN), 8)))
```

# 4. Figures (descriptive)

```{r figures}
cols2 <- c("Reef" = "#E8745B", "Sandy" = "#1FB6B6")
theme_pub <- theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_line(colour="grey25", linewidth=0.4),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour="grey25", linewidth=0.4), legend.position = "bottom")
sv <- function(name,p,w=6.5,h=4.2) ggsave(here("figures", paste0(name,".png")), p, width=w, height=h, dpi=300)

# Figure 1 -- sampling design: deployments by date and site (each point = one deployment)
sv("v6_Fig1_design",
  ggplot(meta, aes(date, site, colour = site)) +
    geom_point(size = 3.4, alpha = 0.85) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = cols2, guide = "none") +
    scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b", date_breaks = "1 month") +
    labs(x = "2024", y = NULL) + theme_pub)

# Figure 2 -- per-deployment richness by site (all 18 deployments shown)
nlab <- function(s){ tb <- table(meta$site); function(b) paste0(b, "\n(n = ", tb[b], ")") }
sv("v6_Fig2_richness",
  ggplot(meta, aes(site, richness, fill = site)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.55, alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.12, height = 0, size = 2.4, alpha = 0.85, aes(colour = site)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cols2, guide="none") + scale_colour_manual(values = cols2, guide="none") +
    scale_x_discrete(labels = nlab()) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Teleost species per deployment") + theme_pub, w=6, h=4.2)

# Figure 3 -- frequency of occurrence (%) of the most frequent species, by site
topsp <- spp_tab |> filter(freq_Reef + freq_Sandy > 0) |> slice_max(freq_Reef + freq_Sandy, n = 12)
occ <- topsp |> select(common, pct_Reef, pct_Sandy) |>
  pivot_longer(c(pct_Reef, pct_Sandy), names_to="site", values_to="pct") |>
  mutate(site = recode(site, pct_Reef="Reef", pct_Sandy="Sandy"),
         common = factor(common, levels = rev(topsp$common)))
sv("v6_Fig3_occurrence",
  ggplot(occ, aes(common, pct, fill = site)) +
    geom_col(position = position_dodge(0.7), width = 0.62) + coord_flip() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cols2, name = "Site") +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Frequency of occurrence (% of deployments)") + theme_pub, w=6.5, h=4.6)

# Figure 4 (exploratory) -- deployment x species MaxN heatmap; no inferential content
hd <- as.data.frame(biota) |> rownames_to_column("dep") |>
  pivot_longer(-dep, names_to="species", values_to="maxN") |>
  left_join(lookup |> select(species, common), by="species") |>
  left_join(meta |> mutate(dep=as.character(dep)) |> select(dep, site), by="dep") |>
  filter(species %in% topsp$species) |>
  mutate(common = factor(common, levels = rev(topsp$common)), dep = factor(dep, levels = meta$dep))
sv("v6_FigS1_heatmap",
  ggplot(hd, aes(dep, common, fill = maxN)) + geom_tile(colour="grey90") +
    facet_grid(~site, scales="free_x", space="free_x") +
    scale_fill_viridis_c(option="D", name="MaxN") +
    labs(x = "Deployment", y = NULL) + theme_pub +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=7)), w=7, h=4.6)
cat("**Figures written: v6_Fig1_design, v6_Fig2_richness, v6_Fig3_occurrence, v6_FigS1_heatmap.**\n\n")
```

# 5. Key results and verification log

```{r keyresults}
key <- tibble(metric = c("Usable deployments","Reef deployments","Sandy deployments","Sampling dates",
  "Zero-teleost deployments","Observed species","Families","Reef richness median","Sandy richness median",
  "Cliff delta richness (descriptive)","Total chapters aggregated"),
  value = c(nrow(meta), nR, nS, dplyr::n_distinct(meta$date), n_zero_dep, n_obs_species, n_families,
            site_summ$richness_median[site_summ$Site=="Reef"], site_summ$richness_median[site_summ$Site=="Sandy"],
            round(cliff_rich,2), nrow(cw)))
readr::write_csv(key, here("output","v6_key_results.csv"))
cat("**Key results (single source of truth for the manuscript).**\n\n"); print(knitr::kable(key))

writeLines(c(paste0("BRUV 2024 deployment-level analysis -- verification log (", Sys.Date(), ")"),
             "", unlist(verif),
             "", "Observational unit = deployment (NOT video chapter). MaxN = max across chapters.",
             "Design = one fixed reef site + one fixed sandy site; descriptive, site-specific; no habitat/MPA/seasonal inference."),
           here("output","v6_VERIFICATION_LOG.txt"))
cat("\n**All verification checks PASSED.**\n\n"); cat(paste0("- ", verif, collapse="\n"), "\n")
```
